channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Fed rate-hike voices swell before July decision, rates still…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Fed rate-hike voices swell before July decision, rates still seen on hold reut.rs/4vufz4F
item.content:encoded: Fed rate-hike voices swell before July decision, rates still seen on hold reut.rs/4vufz4F

item.title: Ultimately, people have to gauge how vulnerable they are and…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Ultimately, people have to gauge how vulnerable they are and what risks they’re willing to take.
item.content:encoded: Ultimately, people have to gauge how vulnerable they are and what risks they’re willing to take.

item.title: #🔖エンタメ そりゃフジテレビも降板させるわ…佐藤二朗の"匂わせ"投稿が生んだインプ1億6000万"総人口超え"の危う…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖エンタメ
そりゃフジテレビも降板させるわ…佐藤二朗の"匂わせ"投稿が生んだインプ1億6000万"総人口超え"の危うさ

佐藤二朗の「もう我慢できません」 俳優・佐藤二朗氏（57）のハラスメント騒動発覚後の言動は、まさに「犬笛」だったのではないか。2026年7月1日のXでの彼のポストは、なんと1億6000万回も表示された。「92万いいね」がついており、異常なほどのインプレッションと支持を集めている。 『さすがに、さすがにもうこれ以上...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖エンタメ
そりゃフジテレビも降板させるわ…佐藤二朗の"匂わせ"投稿が生んだインプ1億6000万"総人口超え"の危うさ

佐藤二朗の「もう我慢できません」 俳優・佐藤二朗氏（57）のハラスメント騒動発覚後の言動は、まさに「犬笛」だったのではないか。2026年7月1日のXでの彼のポストは、なんと1億6000万回も表示された。「92万いいね」がついており、異常なほどのインプレッションと支持を集めている。 『さすがに、さすがにもうこれ以上...

item.title: US judge won't block Meta from laying off workers who filed …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US judge won't block Meta from laying off workers who filed AI discrimination lawsuit reut.rs/4wJm4BK
item.content:encoded: US judge won't block Meta from laying off workers who filed AI discrimination lawsuit reut.rs/4wJm4BK

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 第1回 小顔 / デュムダムベルダム - いがらしみきお | webアクション デュムダムベルダ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
第1回 小顔 / デュムダムベルダム - いがらしみきお | webアクション

デュムダムベルダム いがらしみきお 『さばおり劇場』から44年。東北の巨匠が再び「ギャグ」のリングへ！　齢70を超えてなおその拳は研ぎ澄まされている。『人間一生図巻』で極めた緻密なグレースケールが、現代社会を鋭く、可笑しく、残酷に描き出す。
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
第1回 小顔 / デュムダムベルダム - いがらしみきお | webアクション

デュムダムベルダム いがらしみきお 『さばおり劇場』から44年。東北の巨匠が再び「ギャグ」のリングへ！　齢70を超えてなおその拳は研ぎ澄まされている。『人間一生図巻』で極めた緻密なグレースケールが、現代社会を鋭く、可笑しく、残酷に描き出す。

item.title: After the ICE agents’ actions attracted attention from onloo…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: After the ICE agents’ actions attracted attention from onlookers, the agents walked away, leaving the man, Phu Nguyen, with one handcuff attached to one arm.
item.content:encoded: After the ICE agents’ actions attracted attention from onlookers, the agents walked away, leaving the man, Phu Nguyen, with one handcuff attached to one arm.

item.title: Playboy has relaunched a print edition with a "respectful an…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Playboy has relaunched a print edition with a "respectful and modern" take on nudity; in 2025, its parent company had a $12.7M net loss on $120.9M in revenue (Charlotte Tobitt/Press Gazette)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Playboy has relaunched a print edition with a "respectful and modern" take on nudity; in 2025, its parent company had a $12.7M net loss on $120.9M in revenue (Charlotte Tobitt/Press Gazette)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: Exclusive: Apple and the US Justice Department are in early …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Exclusive: Apple and the US Justice Department are in early discussions about settling a 2024 lawsuit that alleges the iPhone maker violated antitrust laws
item.content:encoded: Exclusive: Apple and the US Justice Department are in early discussions about settling a 2024 lawsuit that alleges the iPhone maker violated antitrust laws

item.title: The Old Ladies Against Underwater Garbage estimate they’ve r…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The Old Ladies Against Underwater Garbage estimate they’ve removed 6,000 pounds of refuse from ponds on Cape Cod. Members have to be at least 64 and able to swim half a mile in under 30 minutes and free dive to eight feet. “It’s the best feeling,” one said.
item.content:encoded: The Old Ladies Against Underwater Garbage estimate they’ve removed 6,000 pounds of refuse from ponds on Cape Cod. Members have to be at least 64 and able to swim half a mile in under 30 minutes and free dive to eight feet. “It’s the best feeling,” one said.

item.title: India's Federal Bank flags 1.5-2% of net worth hit from new …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: India's Federal Bank flags 1.5-2% of net worth hit from new RBI norms reut.rs/3RiSF2k
item.content:encoded: India's Federal Bank flags 1.5-2% of net worth hit from new RBI norms reut.rs/3RiSF2k

item.title: #🔖世の中 MADE IN YAMATO - 第８話 獣害大怪獣タオパゴダ | ヤンマガWeb MADE IN YA…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
MADE IN YAMATO - 第８話　獣害大怪獣タオパゴダ | ヤンマガWeb

MADE IN YAMATO。この女、ただの筋トレ女子にあらず、 筋に囚われた獣なり‼ 美容、健康、話題作り、様々な理由で筋トレをする者がいるが、この女、信濃川大和はそんな生ぬるい理由では断じて筋トレはせぬ‼ ひたすらに筋肉を愛し筋肉のために筋肉を想い続け筋肉を育てし求道者なり‼ しかし、筋肉とは仲良くできても、ちょ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
MADE IN YAMATO - 第８話　獣害大怪獣タオパゴダ | ヤンマガWeb

MADE IN YAMATO。この女、ただの筋トレ女子にあらず、 筋に囚われた獣なり‼ 美容、健康、話題作り、様々な理由で筋トレをする者がいるが、この女、信濃川大和はそんな生ぬるい理由では断じて筋トレはせぬ‼ ひたすらに筋肉を愛し筋肉のために筋肉を想い続け筋肉を育てし求道者なり‼ しかし、筋肉とは仲良くできても、ちょ...

item.title: An independent committee investigating the cause of Hong Kon…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: An independent committee investigating the cause of Hong Kong’s deadliest fire in decades heard arguments on how improper practices that evaded regulatory oversight turned a small fire into a tragedy as the investigation nears its conclusion.
item.content:encoded: An independent committee investigating the cause of Hong Kong’s deadliest fire in decades heard arguments on how improper practices that evaded regulatory oversight turned a small fire into a tragedy as the investigation nears its conclusion.

item.title: More than 100 House rating changes have been issued this yea…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: More than 100 House rating changes have been issued this year, and the vast majority have moved in Democrats' favor.
item.content:encoded: More than 100 House rating changes have been issued this year, and the vast majority have moved in Democrats' favor.

item.title: For years, President Trump has offered conspiracy theories a…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: For years, President Trump has offered conspiracy theories and baseless charges to support his falsehood that the 2020 election was stolen from him. In the end, he was unable to prove his case.
item.content:encoded: For years, President Trump has offered conspiracy theories and baseless charges to support his falsehood that the 2020 election was stolen from him. In the end, he was unable to prove his case.

item.title: #🔖エンタメ 【1日限定公開】『機動警察パトレイバー ON TELEVISION』第01話「イングラム起動」／第02話…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖エンタメ
【1日限定公開】『機動警察パトレイバー ON TELEVISION』第01話「イングラム起動」／第02話「香貫花が来た」 #毎日パトレイバー

『機動警察パトレイバー EZY File 2』の劇場公開を記念して、2026年7月17日(金)より毎日21:00に『機動警察パトレイバー ON TELEVISION』を1日2話限定公開！題して「 #毎日パトレイバー 」第二弾！ ◆スケジュールはこちらをチェック！ ⇒https://patlabor.tokyo/news/1740/ ◆各配信サイトでも「 #パトレイバー 」シリーズ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖エンタメ
【1日限定公開】『機動警察パトレイバー ON TELEVISION』第01話「イングラム起動」／第02話「香貫花が来た」 #毎日パトレイバー

『機動警察パトレイバー EZY File 2』の劇場公開を記念して、2026年7月17日(金)より毎日21:00に『機動警察パトレイバー ON TELEVISION』を1日2話限定公開！題して「 #毎日パトレイバー 」第二弾！ ◆スケジュールはこちらをチェック！ ⇒https://patlabor.tokyo/news/1740/ ◆各配信サイトでも「 #パトレイバー 」シリーズ...

item.title: Remains found in 1981 in the Santa Rosa Mountains near Palm …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Remains found in 1981 in the Santa Rosa Mountains near Palm Springs, California, were recently identified due to DNA testing as those of Thelma Gaston, who was 80 when she was reported missing.
item.content:encoded: Remains found in 1981 in the Santa Rosa Mountains near Palm Springs, California, were recently identified due to DNA testing as those of Thelma Gaston, who was 80 when she was reported missing.

item.title: Charles Littlejohn, the former IRS contractor who leaked tax…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Charles Littlejohn, the former IRS contractor who leaked tax information about Trump and thousands of other wealthy Americans, lost an appeal of his five-year prison sentence
item.content:encoded: Charles Littlejohn, the former IRS contractor who leaked tax information about Trump and thousands of other wealthy Americans, lost an appeal of his five-year prison sentence

item.title: The Trump administration took an extraordinary step this wee…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The Trump administration took an extraordinary step this week to escalate its nationwide efforts to prevent states from regulating prediction markets, where users can trade on real-world events like sports, politics and pop culture. https://cnn.it/4wLSbR8
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration took an extraordinary step this week to escalate its nationwide efforts to prevent states from regulating prediction markets, where users can trade on real-world events like sports, politics and pop culture. https://cnn.it/4wLSbR8

item.title: The remains of several geese were found on a New York City s…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The remains of several geese were found on a New York City sightseeing helicopter that crashed into the Hudson River last year and killed 6 people, investigators say, strong suggestions that multiple bird strikes contributed to the tragedy.
item.content:encoded: The remains of several geese were found on a New York City sightseeing helicopter that crashed into the Hudson River last year and killed 6 people, investigators say, strong suggestions that multiple bird strikes contributed to the tragedy.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第7歩目]あっ、悪魔ちゃん - 深津ザオウ | 少年ジャンプ＋ あっ、悪魔ちゃん 深津ザオウ …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第7歩目]あっ、悪魔ちゃん - 深津ザオウ | 少年ジャンプ＋

あっ、悪魔ちゃん 深津ザオウ <毎週土曜更新>とある片田舎、陽凪はある日、想い人・石鳥くんの東京行きを知る。「地元を盛り上げて、東京行きを考え直させる！」陽凪は、一世一代の変身を遂げる…!!恋は少女を悪魔に変える!?全力疾走ラブコメディ!! [JC1巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第7歩目]あっ、悪魔ちゃん - 深津ザオウ | 少年ジャンプ＋

あっ、悪魔ちゃん 深津ザオウ <毎週土曜更新>とある片田舎、陽凪はある日、想い人・石鳥くんの東京行きを知る。「地元を盛り上げて、東京行きを考え直させる！」陽凪は、一世一代の変身を遂げる…!!恋は少女を悪魔に変える!?全力疾走ラブコメディ!! [JC1巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: Wisconsin Democratic Lt. Gov. Sarah Rodriguez drops out of t…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Wisconsin Democratic Lt. Gov. Sarah Rodriguez drops out of the governor’s race, just days after her campaign discovered major inaccuracies related to its financial reporting.
item.content:encoded: Wisconsin Democratic Lt. Gov. Sarah Rodriguez drops out of the governor’s race, just days after her campaign discovered major inaccuracies related to its financial reporting.

item.title: Dense smoke from Canadian wildfires has pushed air quality t…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Dense smoke from Canadian wildfires has pushed air quality to dangerous levels in the past few days and dirtied the air in new parts of the U.S. on Friday. Follow live updates.
item.content:encoded: Dense smoke from Canadian wildfires has pushed air quality to dangerous levels in the past few days and dirtied the air in new parts of the U.S. on Friday. Follow live updates.

item.description: Smoke from wildfires scorching eastern Canada and northern Minnesota dirtied the air in new parts of the U.S. on Friday morning. Use our tracker to check the air quality where you live. trib.al/Abd39zv
item.content:encoded: Smoke from wildfires scorching eastern Canada and northern Minnesota dirtied the air in new parts of the U.S. on Friday morning. Use our tracker to check the air quality where you live. trib.al/Abd39zv

item.title: Climate change makes compound events more likely, and respon…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Climate change makes compound events more likely, and responding to them is harder than ever.
item.content:encoded: Climate change makes compound events more likely, and responding to them is harder than ever.
